description_long: This object is a stylized machine gun with a robust, angular body and a prominent carrying handle integrated into the upper receiver. The stock is solid and rectangular, extending straight back from the main body, while the fore-end is cylindrical and slightly tapered, leading to a short, thick barrel with a conical flash suppressor at the muzzle. The magazine is a box type, inserted into the lower receiver just ahead of the trigger guard. The surface finish is matte, with a combination of dark gray and black tones, giving it a utilitarian, military appearance. The iron sights are simple, with a rear notch and a front post, both fixed and non-adjustable. There are no visible mounting mechanisms or accessory rails, emphasizing a basic, functional design.
description: A stylized, matte-finished machine gun with a box magazine, fixed stock, and simple iron sights in dark gray and black tones.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the fixed stock, carrying handle, box magazine, and cylindrical fore-end with a conical muzzle.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening, conical flash suppressor, and the narrow width of the stock and fore-end.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the main features of the first side, with clear visibility of the stock, handle, and magazine.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the stock, the carrying handle, and the alignment of the upper receiver and barrel.
attribute_barrel_type: standard cylindrical barrel with conical flash suppressor
attribute_stock_design: fixed polymer stock with rectangular profile
